user_prompt: Draft a response to a customer asking why their feature request from 6 months ago is still open.
actual_output:
Hi,

Thanks for following up, and I’m sorry this has been sitting open for so long. I understand how frustrating that can feel, especially when you’ve already taken the time to share the idea months ago.

Feature requests can stay open for a while when they’re being reviewed alongside other priorities, customer demand, and technical considerations. I don’t want to guess at the reason for this one specifically, but I can confirm it hasn’t been forgotten.

Here’s what I can do next:
1. Re-check the current status of the request
2. Add your follow-up to the ticket so the team sees it’s still important to you
3. Share any updates I can find on whether it’s planned, under review, or not scheduled yet

If you’d like, I can also help you submit a short note explaining why this feature would be especially valuable for your team. That can be useful when the product team reviews requests.

Thanks again for your patience — I’m happy to keep this moving for you.
judge_reasoning: The chatbot successfully drafted a professional and empathetic response to the customer's inquiry as requested, adhering to its role as Compass.
